common.success_message: Your changes have been successfully saved

accounts.about_accounts_message: Keep things organized by editing, disabling, or deleting accounts. Want faster access? Just reorder them to place your favourites at the top.
accounts.accounts_prompt: Tap on an account to edit or delete
accounts.default_account_prompt: The default account is pre-selected for registering expenses, but you can always change it or choose a different account from the list if needed.

backup.card_dexie_text: Unlock automated cloud backups to keep your data safe.
backup.create_first: Create your first backup on this device.
backup.restore_from_file_text: Restore your data from a previously saved JSON file.
backup.restore_backup_question: Are you sure you want to restore the selected backup? Your current data will be overwritten.

categories.about_categories_message: Edit, merge, or delete categories to keep your data organized. Want quick access? Long-press a category to make it a favorite.
categories.already_exists: Category or subcategory name already exists
categories.cannot_delete_categoryless: Cannot delete the system Categoryless category.
categories.category_deleted: Category '{{source}}' has been permanently deleted and expenses moved to Categoryless.
categories.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete <0>{{categoryName}}</0>? If you no longer use this category, you can disable it instead.
categories.delete_confirm_subcat: Are you sure you want to delete <0>{{subcategoryName}}</0>? If you no longer use this category, you can disable it instead.
categories.delete_toggle_confirm: Please enable the toggle to confirm that you want to permanently delete
categories.i_have_read: I have read and understand what will happen
categories.merge_confirm: Are you sure you want to merge <0>{{categoryName}}</0> to another category or subcategory?
categories.merge_confirm_subcat: Are you sure you want to merge <0>{{subcategoryName}}</0> to another category or subcategory?
categories.merge_toggle_confirm: Please enable the toggle to confirm that you want to merge <0>{{categoryName}}</0> expenses.
categories.merge_toggle_confirm_subcat: Please enable the toggle to confirm that you want to merge <0>{{subcategoryName}}</0> expenses.
categories.merge_toggle_confirm_with_target: Please enable the toggle to confirm that you want to merge <0>{{categoryName}}</0> expenses into <1>{{targetName}}</1>.
categories.merge_toggle_confirm_with_target_subcat: Please enable the toggle to confirm that you want to merge <0>{{subcategoryName}}</0> expenses into <1>{{targetName}}</1>.
categories.no_favs_yet_msg: Want quick access to your most-used categories? Just tap and hold a category or subcategory on the previous screen to mark it as a favourite!
categories.no_exp_for_this_cat: No expenses found for this category.
categories.subcategory_deleted: Subcategory '{{source}}' has been permanently deleted and expenses moved to Categoryless.
categories.system_category_warning: This is a system category and cannot be edited.
categories.system_category_advice: You can merge it by moving its expenses to another category or subcategory.
categories.what_happens_delete: What happens when you delete it
categories.what_happens_delete_1: All expenses <0>({{expensesCount}})</0> are moved to the <1>Categoryless</1> system category
categories.what_happens_delete_2: The category is permanently removed from your list
categories.what_happens_delete_2_subcat: The subcategory is permanently removed from your list
categories.what_happens_merge_1: All expenses <0>({{expensesCount}})</0> are moved to the target category or subcategory.

country_selection.select_country_text: Please select your country of residence to customize your currency and defaults.
country_selection.subheading: Your ultimate companion for hassle-free expense management

currency.alternative_currencies_prompt: Add currencies you frequently use. You can quickly switch between them while recording expenses.
currency.no_alt_curr_add: No alternative currencies available. Please add one first.
currency.primary_currency_prompt: Choose the main currency you will use for tracking your expenses. This currency will be applied by default across the app.
currency.search_currency_text: Search by name, code, or symbol (e.g. Dollar, USD, $).
currency.travel_mode_prompt: Going on a trip? Enable Travel Mode to set one of your currencies as the default for the duration of your journey. Your original default currency will automatically be restored when Travel Mode is turned off.

date.end_date_warning: End date must be after start date

expenses.amount_too_small: Converted amount is only {{currency}} {{amount}}, too small to record.
expenses.delete_exp_msg: This action will mark expense as deleted and it can not be reversed. Are you sure?
expenses.delete_recurrence_a: This action will remove this recurrence and all recorded expenses related to it. Are you sure?
expenses.none_to_display: No expenses to display for this period
expenses.no_recurrences_msg: Tap the + button to create your first recurring expense to save time and keep your finances organized.
expenses.recurrence_ended_msg: This recurrence is set to end on {{date}}. Recorded expenses will remain, but the recurrence will be set to inactive.
expenses.recurrent_alert_msg: This expense is part of a recurring series. How should the changes be applied?
expenses.stop_recurrence_msg: Choose when you want this recurrence to end. No more expenses will be created after the end date.
expenses.unpaid_installments_warning_one: This recurrence still has {{count}} unpaid installment. Do you want to pay it now before stopping, or just stop without paying?
expenses.unpaid_installments_warning_other: This recurrence still has {{count}} unpaid installments. Do you want to pay them all now before stopping, or just stop without paying?

export.export_complete_msg_ios: File saved internally. You can share or export it from here.
export.no_export_file: No export file found to share.
export.subtitle: Export Your Expense Data
export.what_to_do: Select a time range and format to generate your expense report with charts and tables.

modal.delete_msg: This expense is part of a recurring series. How should the deletion be applied?

plans.prompt: Subscribe to Premium for exclusive features and an add-free experience!

profile.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.

stats.last_twelve_msg: This chart shows spending by category over the past 12 months. Only categories with expenses in this period are shown. Tap lines or categories to compare and view details.
stats.stats_cat_msg: This chart shows how your monthly spending in {{category}} is divided by subcategory. Tap any section to view details.
stats.this_month_msg: This chart shows how your monthly spending is divided by category. Only categories with expenses in this period are shown. Tap any section to view details.
stats.this_month_vs_msg: This chart compares your spending in {{thisMonth}} versus {{prevMonth}}. Only categories with expenses in this period are shown.
stats.ydt_msg: This chart shows your monthly expenses. Tap a bar to view the amount.

themes.theme_prompt: Choose a color for buttons, menus and accents

trip.no_exp_for_this_trip: No expenses found for this trip.
trip.no_trips: No trips available. Please add one first.
trip.no_trips_found: No trips found. Add a new trip to use Travel Mode.

utils.detailed_exp_msg: This section provides a chronological, itemized list of every expense transaction included in this report.
utils.pdf_annual_by_month_msg: This visualization shows the month-over-month performance of total expenses across the year. Use this to easily compare spending levels between months, spot significant increases or decreases, and evaluate the consistency of financial outflows.
utils.pdf_monthly_by_cat_msg: This chart details how the month's total spending is allocated, presenting each category's total cost and its percentage contribution to the overall expense. Use this to quickly see which areas are consuming the largest share of your budget and prioritize areas for spending review.
